posts.community: Viviana Power Tech - Plugged into India’s Power Boom
posts.text: Viviana Power : We are pleased to inform you that Viviana Power Tech Limited has received In-principle approval for migration of trading in the equity shares of the company from SME Platform (EMERGE) to Main Board. New and exciting journey begins in mainboard​ IMG-20260522-WA0000 637×690 96 KB
